examples: If fighting worsens, the troops might be reinforced, or ingloriously withdrawn.
It was ingloriously shut down after springing a helium leak in September 2008, before it had even got properly going.
This single stick, which you now behold ingloriously lying in that neglected corner, I once knew in a flourishing state in a forest.
Jim Furyk was ingloriously disqualified from the first playoff event for oversleeping and missing his pro-am tee time.
